title: Build your Integration
description: Implement Build your Integration with Stripe.

nodes.title: Create a checkout session
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Set up your frontend
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Handle Checkout and billing events reliably
nodes.description: Run webhook setup and confirm add events to an event destination to send events to your integration
nodes.review_prompt: Run the Stripe CLI listener and confirm webhook forwarding reaches the local endpoint.
